case_title: GUERRA GREGORY VS LUXOR CAB CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LUXOR CAB CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GUERRA GREGORY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LUXOR CAB CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GUERRA GREGORY NOT APPEALED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB CO.
